---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for NullCarbon
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly.
Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any design ideas, API shape, or technical approach.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Affected Component
- [ ] Circuits (Noir)
- [ ] Contracts (Soroban / Rust)
- [ ] Backend (NestJS)
- [ ] Frontend (Angular)
- [ ] Indexer
- [ ] Scripts
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / DevOps

## Additional Context
- Links to related issues or discussions
- Reference implementations in other projects
- Screenshots or mockups (if UI related)
- Performance considerations (if applicable)

## Would you be willing to implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea
